top_signals.title: China studied US stealth aircraft — and learned the wrong lessons
top_signals.summary: An Air Force researcher said China's assessments of U.S. stealth capabilities "diverge from technical reality and operational practice."
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bolsonaro Family Tension Rises as Michelle Criticizes Flávio
top_signals.summary: Former First Lady Michelle Bolsonaro signaled she plans to remain on the sidelines of Flávio Bolsonaro’s presidential campaign after what she described as a disrespectful phone call with her stepson, exposing fresh tensions within the family at the center of Brazil’s right-wing opposition to President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Circle, Nomura eye Japan corporate FX with stablecoin settlement: Report
top_signals.summary: Circle and Nomura are reportedly partnering to enable stablecoin-based foreign exchange settlement for Japanese companies as the country's regulated blockchain-based financial infrastructure expands.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
